headerTitle: Solutions Engineer  ·  Enterprise SaaS Integration  ·  AI-Native Platform  ·  Customer Technical Lead
intro: Cypher Learning is building the AI-native LMS — CYPHER Agent, an agentic natural-language interface across content creation, delivery, personalization, and analytics. The Solutions Engineer drives technical evaluations and integration from discovery through adoption.
bullets: Technical evaluation to adoption — six complete SE-equivalent cycles: discovery, integration design, stakeholder navigation, and adoption measurement. 13 production platforms, 6-week average cadence from technical assessment to handoff.

REST API integration engineering — Stripe, Google OAuth2, IMAP/SMTP, Twilio, Sinch, and webhook pipelines across 13 production systems. Troubleshoot auth flows, navigate data schemas, support integration design from both sides of the stack.

AI-native platform expertise — 14 live Claude endpoints (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus routing), multi-model LLM workflows, MCP protocol, structured JSON output. Can speak to practical enterprise applications of agentic interfaces from direct build experience.
closingLine: Available immediately. U.S. Remote — Texas-based, near Plano HQ.
matchNotes: LTI/SCORM/SAML specifics are a gap — frame API + integration depth as the transferable pattern. TX-based candidate = geographic alignment to Plano HQ. Lowest salary in batch but most accessible bar and direct on-ramp to SE track at AI-native company.
